item.title: Pull-Starting an Old Farm Tractor
item.description: Laura Farms tries to pull-start an old tractor, showing the hands-on work and patience that come with farm life.

media:content.media:title: Pull-Starting an Old Farm Tractor
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms tries to pull-start an old tractor, showing the hands-on work and patience that come with farm life.

item.title: Filling the Tanks With 1,000 Gallons of Fertilizer
item.description: Laura Farms fills the tanks with 1,000 gallons of fertilizer, keeping the work moving and the season on track.

media:content.media:title: Filling the Tanks With 1,000 Gallons of Fertilizer
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms fills the tanks with 1,000 gallons of fertilizer, keeping the work moving and the season on track.

item.title: This Tractor Means Business
item.description: Laura Farms shares a tractor moment that means business on the farm, highlighting the machinery and the steady work that keeps things moving.

media:content.media:title: This Tractor Means Business
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a tractor moment that means business on the farm, highlighting the machinery and the steady work that keeps things moving.

item.title: Is a $500,000 Farm Machine Worth It?
item.description: Laura Farms looks at whether a $500,000 farm machine is worth the investment, sharing a practical farm-life question with a down-to-earth perspective.

media:content.media:title: Is a $500,000 Farm Machine Worth It?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms looks at whether a $500,000 farm machine is worth the investment, sharing a practical farm-life question with a down-to-earth perspective.

item.title: A Dirty Day in the Field
item.description: Laura Farms shares a muddy day in the field, showing the grit, teamwork, and daily realities of farm life.

media:content.media:title: A Dirty Day in the Field
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a muddy day in the field, showing the grit, teamwork, and daily realities of farm life.

item.title: Spreading Dry Fertilizer at 25 MPH
item.description: Laura Farms is spreading dry fertilizer at 25 MPH, showing the pace and precision that keep fieldwork moving.

media:content.media:title: Spreading Dry Fertilizer at 25 MPH
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms is spreading dry fertilizer at 25 MPH, showing the pace and precision that keep fieldwork moving.

item.title: Helping Save a Neighbor’s Tractor
item.description: Laura Farms shares a neighborly moment as they help save a burning tractor, showing quick action and farm community spirit.

media:content.media:title: Helping Save a Neighbor’s Tractor
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a neighborly moment as they help save a burning tractor, showing quick action and farm community spirit.

item.title: Turning the Front Lawn Into Hay Bales
item.description: Laura Farms turns the front lawn into hay bales, sharing a simple farm-life moment with tractors, teamwork, and a hands-on harvest feel.

media:content.media:title: Turning the Front Lawn Into Hay Bales
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms turns the front lawn into hay bales, sharing a simple farm-life moment with tractors, teamwork, and a hands-on harvest feel.

item.title: Working in 90-Degree Heat on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a hot day working without AC in 90-degree heat, showing the steady pace and determination that keep farm life moving.

media:content.media:title: Working in 90-Degree Heat on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a hot day working without AC in 90-degree heat, showing the steady pace and determination that keep farm life moving.

item.title: Working in 90-Degree Heat on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a hot day working without AC, showing the realities of farm life and the determination it takes to keep things moving.

media:content.media:title: Working in 90-Degree Heat on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a hot day working without AC, showing the realities of farm life and the determination it takes to keep things moving.

item.title: Pivot Looks Rough Today
item.description: Laura Farms checks on a pivot that’s looking rough today, sharing a real farm moment and the kind of day-to-day problem solving that comes with rural life.

media:content.media:title: Pivot Looks Rough Today
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms checks on a pivot that’s looking rough today, sharing a real farm moment and the kind of day-to-day problem solving that comes with rural life.

item.title: 59 Years Later, Still Running Strong
item.description: A classic piece of farm machinery keeps going strong after 59 years, showing the value of care, hard work, and keeping old equipment in the field.

media:content.media:title: 59 Years Later, Still Running Strong
media:content.media:description: A classic piece of farm machinery keeps going strong after 59 years, showing the value of care, hard work, and keeping old equipment in the field.

item.title: That Was Way Too Close
item.description: A tense farm moment that came very close, showing the realities of daily life around tractors and machinery.

media:content.media:title: That Was Way Too Close
media:content.media:description: A tense farm moment that came very close, showing the realities of daily life around tractors and machinery.
